text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text:
Maya and Marvey's Marvelous School<n>
Revolution! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
The time has come, Mayano! What<n>should we
revolutionize today? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well... How about the student council<n>room?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We could fill the whole room with<n>flowers and
plushies...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I bet that would make the student<n>council suuuper
happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
A marvelous idea! ☆ We better head<n>over there
at once! ★
